description_long: This is a modern, wall-mounted range hood with a geometric, angular design and a matte white finish. The main body consists of a tall, rectangular chimney that extends upward, with a wide, sloped canopy at the base for capturing cooking fumes. The front face features a subtle brand logo and a slim, horizontal control panel with touch-sensitive buttons. The top of the chimney has a circular exhaust outlet, while the underside of the canopy likely houses the air intake and filter system. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal, with some plastic components for the control interface and possible internal parts. The design is sleek and minimalistic, suitable for contemporary urban kitchens.
description: A sleek, white, wall-mounted range hood with a tall chimney and wide, angular canopy, featuring a front control panel and subtle branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the brand logo, touch control panel, and the full width of the canopy.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the chimney and the angular profile of the canopy.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the chimney and the exhaust outlet at the top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the chimney's depth and canopy's side profile.
attribute_brand_logo: A small, black, printed logo is centered on the front face of the chimney, just above the canopy.
attribute_control_panel_type: Touch panel located on the front edge of the canopy, featuring several small, illuminated icons.
attribute_vent_placement: Primary vent/exhaust opening is on the top of the chimney; intake is likely on the underside of the canopy.
attribute_filter_design: No visible filter from exterior views; likely a mesh or baffle filter located on the underside of the canopy.
